content:
Why I Started Writing I’ve been building a personal AI assistant called Jarvis on Google Cloud, working with LangChain, Python, and various APIs. Along the way I’ve learned a lot that isn’t documented well anywhere — so I’m writing it down here.
What I’ll Write About Data engineering patterns and real-world cloud architecture Building AI agents with LangChain and OpenAI Google Cloud Run deployments and gotchas Lessons from building Jarvis Stay tuned.
summary:
Why I Started Writing

I’ve been building a personal AI assistant called Jarvis on Google Cloud, working with LangChain, Python, and various APIs. Along the way I’ve learned a lot that isn’t documented well anywhere — so I’m writing it down here.

What I’ll Write About

  • Data engineering patterns and real-world cloud architecture
  • Building AI agents with LangChain and OpenAI
  • Google Cloud Run deployments and gotchas
  • Lessons from building Jarvis

Stay tuned.
title: Welcome to My Blog
